lines.base_translation: Um leve arrepio me percorre, e um frio\n

lines.text_source: runs down my spine.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: desce pela minha espinha.

lines.text_source: Though Kuon is smiling as sweetly as ever at me,\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Embora Kuon esteja sorrindo tão docemente quanto sempre pra mim,\n

lines.text_source: my blood runs cold for a moment.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: meu sangue gela por um momento.

lines.text_source: Erk! N-Nope, didn't say a word...
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Erk! N-Não, não disse nada...

lines.text_source: In response to my reaction, Kuon clears her\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Em resposta à minha reação, Kuon limpa a\n

lines.text_source: throat with a delicate little cough,\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: garganta com uma tossezinha delicada,\n

lines.text_source: speaking seriously.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: falando sério.

lines.text_source: It's a very distinguished name.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: É um nome muito ilustre.

lines.text_source: It comes from the name of one celebrated in\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Vem do nome de alguém celebrado em\n

lines.text_source: ancient legends and stories.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: lendas e histórias antigas.

lines.text_source: Legends...
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Lendas...

lines.text_source: Yes... from the Utawarerumono.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Sim... do Utawarerumono.

lines.text_source: Without any memories or context, I can't really\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Sem memórias nem contexto, não consigo bem\n

lines.text_source: appreciate or understand the significance.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: apreciar ou entender o significado.

lines.text_source: But something about the faraway affection in her\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Mas algo no afeto distante na expressão\n

lines.text_source: expression tells me it's an important name.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: dela me diz que é um nome importante.

lines.text_source: All right...
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Tudo bem...

lines.text_source: From now on, then, I'm Haku.\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: De agora em diante, então, sou Haku.\n

lines.text_source: Please call me that from now on.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Que me chame assim de agora em diante.

lines.text_source: Mhm. Glad to hear it, I think.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Mhm. Fico feliz em ouvir isso, eu acho.
